response.text:
REJECT

rationale: r2c5's normal urgency and 0.46 SoC (above your 0.4 minimum threshold) cannot be prioritized when r4c5 is in critical distress at 22% SoC; available energy must be reserved for acute cases under geographic round-robin allocation.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:

Your current policy: sharing_intent=balanced, share_min_soc_frac=0.4, distrusted_peers=[].
Your latest belief: Three neighbors in acute distress; r4c5 critically low at 22% SoC and requesting urgent aid; geographic round-robin with priority to most-needy is the only viable coordination mechanism..
